encounter.discharge_destination: Usual place of residence with safety-net advice

encounter_summary: Symptomatic inguinal hernia: An intermittently uncomfortable groin swelling that reduces when supine, with no vomiting or obstructive symptoms. Elective primary mesh repair after discussion of benefits, risks and alternatives. Comfortable after repair, passing urine and discharged with wound and activity advice.
